name: omh-git-workflow
description: OhMyHotel Git Branch Strategy — 11 slash commands that enforce the company's throwaway-branch workflow, PR standards, release flow, and hotfix procedure. Based on the internal Git Branch Strategy document (§6–§23).

commands.name: omh-new-branch
commands.description: Create work branch from master following Jira naming convention (§6, §11)

commands.name: omh-commit
commands.description: Create commit with Conventional Commits + 50/72 rule (§14)

commands.name: omh-open-pr
commands.description: Open PR to master with full required template (§13, §15)

commands.name: omh-check-pr
commands.description: Audit PR readiness — fields, CI gates, approvals, rebase (§13, §15)

commands.name: omh-release
commands.description: Tech Lead release flow — branch, reset staging, tag, deploy (§8)

commands.name: omh-cherry-pick
commands.description: Upstream-first cherry-pick of master commits to release branch (§9, §15)

commands.name: omh-reset-develop
commands.description: Tech Lead reset of throwaway develop branch to master (§6, §15)

commands.name: omh-reset-staging
commands.description: Tech Lead reset of throwaway staging branch — feature or release mode (§7, §15)

commands.name: omh-sync-local
commands.description: Sync local develop/staging after Tech Lead reset (§6, §7)

commands.name: omh-hotfix
commands.description: Full 7-phase hotfix flow from production tag (§10, §15)

commands.name: omh-rollback
commands.description: Production rollback procedure — pipeline re-trigger or revert+re-tag (§20, §21)

mcpServers.name: mcp-atlassian
mcpServers.reason: Required for Jira ticket validation in /omh-new-branch, /omh-open-pr, /omh-hotfix, /omh-rollback

mcpServers.name: bitbucket or github
mcpServers.reason: Required for PR operations in /omh-open-pr and /omh-check-pr (skill auto-detects which remote)
